caption: 🔥 The lecture hall was buzzing with energy, but as I adjusted the hem of my silk blouse, the whispers in the back row turned into murmurs. Tonight, I wasn't just Professor Elena Rossi, the stern Italian literature instructor. I was a secret... 🍒 My skirt was tight, hugging every curve, the top blouse hugging even tighter, my heavy curves pressed against the fabric. The classroom was dimly lit, the projector humming in the background, but my heart was pounding with every glance I received from my students. I moved between the rows, my hips swaying rhythmically, a slow seduction disguised as grading papers. A soft touch on my shoulder made me turn, a student's eyes locked onto mine, burning with curiosity and desire. I leaned down to whisper something about his essay, my breath hot against his neck. He shivered. Tonight was about more than just teaching... it was about awakening. 💋 #ProfessorPlaybook #UniversitySecrets #CurvesInClass #SeductionUnderTheSyllabus #ElenaRossi #ItalianBeauty #StudentTeacherDrama #SensualAcademia #OfficeHours #SecretDesires
